## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` and `golangci-lint run` pass
- [ ] Full fixture corpus stays at 100.00% (`make test-fixtures`), or the database pin
      is updated in the same PR with an explanation
- [ ] Any ported logic comes from upstream PHP sources only (no code from other ports)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under Unreleased (user-visible changes)
